target_skill.name: systematic-test
target_skill.description: Verify built code works — "test this", "QA this", "does this work". Auto-fires after build. Not for bugs (→ systematic-debug) or code review (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: systematic-debug
competing_skills.description: Fix bugs systematically — "X is broken", "isn't working", "fix didn't work", "still failing", "why is X happening". Not for features (→ build) or architecture (→ architect).

competing_skills.name: build
competing_skills.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this", "make it real". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: review-panel
competing_skills.description: Multi-agent review — "panel review", "Gemini review", "full review", "calibrate scores", "audit my vault". Auto-runs as build Phase 7. Not solo (→ delegate-analytical/adversarial).

competing_skills.name: architect
competing_skills.description: Plan before coding — "architect this", "tech spec", "PRD", "how would I build this". Produces SPEC.md/PLAN.md. Not for raw ideas (→ idea-scout), code (→ build), or deploy (→ ship-it).

positive_cases: Test the new vault filter feature I just built — make sure it actually works
QA the new prefill flow end to end before I show it to anyone
Does the bookmarklet correctly extract address, ZPID, and photo URLs on these 3 sample listings?
Verify /api/cache returns the right shape for both hit and miss paths
negative_cases: The cache endpoint is returning 500s on every third call — find the bug
Run a full panel review on my new skill before I push
Build a smoke test suite for this React app — pure-logic tests
Why does the prefill link work for some listings but not others?
Plan how I'd architect testing across a multi-page form flow
